query: I want to capture my writing voice. Here are 10 emails I've written to customers.
expected_behavior: Identifies the subject type as 'Person' before doing anything else
Analyzes the corpus silently before asking any questions
Produces at least 8 specific, falsifiable hypotheses with quoted evidence from the emails
Does NOT ask 'How would you describe your tone?' — deduces from text and presents hypotheses instead
Asks only one question at a time during hypothesis validation
